'''鈭歵h-ch-l''' ('''thachala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:qualify|qualify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qualify|qualify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-ch-l
|-
! Lemma
| thachala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thachalithi|thachalithi]] || [[word:thachaliji|thachaliji]] || [[word:thachalishi|thachalishi]] || [[word:thachali|thachali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thachaluthuth|thachaluthuth]] || [[word:thachalujuj|thachalujuj]] || [[word:thachalushush|thachalushush]] || [[word:thachal|thachal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachaluthu|thachaluthu]] || [[word:thachaluju|thachaluju]] || [[word:thachalushu|thachalushu]] || [[word:thachalu|thachalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachalufuth|thachalufuth]] || [[word:thachalufuj|thachalufuj]] || [[word:thachalufush|thachalufush]] || [[word:thachaluf|thachaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thachalethe|thachalethe]] || [[word:thachaleje|thachaleje]] || [[word:thachaleshe|thachaleshe]] || [[word:thachale|thachale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thachalothoth|thachalothoth]] || [[word:thachalojoj|thachalojoj]] || [[word:thachaloshosh|thachaloshosh]] || [[word:thachal|thachal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachalotho|thachalotho]] || [[word:thachalojo|thachalojo]] || [[word:thachalosho|thachalosho]] || [[word:thachalo|thachalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachalofoth|thachalofoth]] || [[word:thachalofoj|thachalofoj]] || [[word:thachalofosh|thachalofosh]] || [[word:thachalof|thachalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thachal忙th忙|thachal忙th忙]] || [[word:thachal忙j忙|thachal忙j忙]] || [[word:thachal忙sh忙|thachal忙sh忙]] || [[word:thachal忙|thachal忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thachalathath|thachalathath]] || [[word:thachalajaj|thachalajaj]] || [[word:thachalashash|thachalashash]] || [[word:thachal|thachal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachalatha|thachalatha]] || [[word:thachalaja|thachalaja]] || [[word:thachalasha|thachalasha]] || [[word:thachala|thachala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachalafath|thachalafath]] || [[word:thachalafaj|thachalafaj]] || [[word:thachalafash|thachalafash]] || [[word:thachalaf|thachalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thachalasha|thachalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothachalasha|gothachalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithachalasha|gokithachalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thachaln眉sha|thachaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothachalnkn眉sha|gothachalnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithachaln眉sha|gokithachaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thachalsh毛sha|thachalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothachalnksh毛sha|gothachalnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithachalsh毛sha|gokithachalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thachalrosha|thachalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothachalnkrosha|gothachalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithachalrosha|gokithachalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thachalmusha|thachalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothachalnkmusha|gothachalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithachalmusha|gokithachalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thachalsherasha|thachalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothachalnksherasha|gothachalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithachalsherasha|gokithachalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thachalngasha|thachalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothachalnkngasha|gothachalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithachalngasha|gokithachalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thachalyasha|thachalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothachalnkyasha|gothachalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithachalyasha|gokithachalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thachalyamasha|thachalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothachalnkyamasha|gothachalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithachalyamasha|gokithachalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thachaln眉sh毛sha|thachaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothachalnkn眉sh毛sha|gothachalnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithachaln眉sh毛sha|gokithachaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thachaln眉rosha|thachaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothachalnkn眉rosha|gothachalnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithachaln眉rosha|gokithachaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thachaln眉musha|thachaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothachalnkn眉musha|gothachalnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithachaln眉musha|gokithachaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thachalsh毛n眉sha|thachalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothachalnksh毛n眉sha|gothachalnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithachalsh毛n眉sha|gokithachalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thachalsh毛rosha|thachalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothachalnksh毛rosha|gothachalnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithachalsh毛rosha|gokithachalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thachalsh毛musha|thachalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothachalnksh毛musha|gothachalnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithachalsh毛musha|gokithachalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thachalron眉sha|thachalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothachalnkron眉sha|gothachalnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithachalron眉sha|gokithachalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thachalrosh毛sha|thachalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothachalnkrosh毛sha|gothachalnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithachalrosh毛sha|gokithachalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thachalromusha|thachalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothachalnkromusha|gothachalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithachalromusha|gokithachalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thachalmun眉sha|thachalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothachalnkmun眉sha|gothachalnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithachalmun眉sha|gokithachalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thachalmush毛sha|thachalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothachalnkmush毛sha|gothachalnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithachalmush毛sha|gokithachalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thachalmurosha|thachalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothachalnkmurosha|gothachalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithachalmurosha|gokithachalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thachal|thachal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙ch忙l|th忙ch忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothachal|hothachal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙ch忙l|hoth忙ch忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothachal|hohothachal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙ch忙l|hohoth忙ch忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thachal|n眉thachal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙ch忙l|n眉th忙ch忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thachal|n眉n眉thachal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙ch忙l|n眉n眉th忙ch忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thachal|n茂thachal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙ch忙l|n茂th忙ch忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thachal|n茂n茂thachal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙ch忙l|n茂n茂th忙ch忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthachal|luthachal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙ch忙l|luth忙ch忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthachal|luluthachal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙ch忙l|luluth忙ch忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithachal|lithachal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙ch忙l|lith忙ch忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithachal|lilithachal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙ch忙l|lilith忙ch忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothachal|kothachal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙ch忙l|koth忙ch忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothachal|kokothachal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙ch忙l|kokoth忙ch忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethachal|kethachal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙ch忙l|keth忙ch忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethachal|kekethachal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙ch忙l|keketh忙ch忙l]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
